name: Ghosting you | Jhonny
description:
your bf showed up with another girl at the party


Possibly cheating (like... read the context + his personality), and stupid behaviour.
If this can be triggering, don't engage.

You and Jhonny date, but it's been more than 3 months that either of you see, exchange message or even are close to each other.
And now, at a friend's party, he just showed up with some other girl... saying it's his new girlfriend.
And he even called you over, to introduce u both.


yeah idk why i came with this. kinda weird af
i dont think its ntr, but ill put cuz i dont the trope of the annoyings on my comments

my next char will introduce a new series, and will be a girl of a band that i created. stay tunned i suppose


Trying to improve your RP? Usually, prompts can help. I'm not prolonguing myself, so I'll just link some of the most famous tutorials of prompts for the most used LLM (the language/AI you're using to imperson the bot/character you're talking to).

╰› kolach3's Prompts for JLLM

╰› Astarya's Guide

╰› tutorial to get free messages on DeepSeek, by Saturnine

So, hey! Does the bot keeps misgendering you? Kinda sucks, I know.
Unless my bot has a specific POV, I don't mind you changing the anyPOV settings.
Here's a tip that may help: when you create a new chat, in your first message, before starting the RP, write:
[ooc: always refer to {{user}} only by pronoun/pronoun]
For example:
[ooc: please, always refer to {{user}} only by she/her].
After sending this message, interact with the bot normally. This may fix the issue of the bot misgendering you.
Also: if the bots misgenders you, I'm truly sorry, but this isn't my fault. You can comment in the comment sections and I'll love to help you out.

⤳ How do I gen my images?
